query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: US stocks drift as oil falls and Wall Street waits for SpaceX's debut
articles.description: U.S. stocks are drifting after oil prices fell again and as Wall Street waits for the highly anticipated debut of SpaceX coming later in the day. The S&P 500 rose 0.1% Friday. The Dow added 166 points, and the Nasdaq composite slipped 0.3%. SpaceX’s stock will begin trading later in the day, and it could show how hungry investors still are for AI stocks following vicious swings and big doubts for them over the last week. Oil prices fell further on hopes for a deal between the United States and Iran that could get oil flowing globally again.

articles.title: US consumer sentiment improves in June
articles.description: U.S. consumer sentiment improved in early June as easing gasoline ​prices offered households some relief, though ‌concerns about inflation lingered, a survey showed on Friday.

articles.title: Indonesian students decry ‘wasteful’ state spending
articles.description: JAKARTA - Hundreds of Indonesian students rallied in Jakarta on Friday to protest against the spending priorities of President Prabowo Subianto’s government, and to oppose this week’s decision to raise petrol prices.

articles.title: Petrol, diesel and LPG costs drive inflation higher; SBI Research flags rising imported price pressures
articles.description: Rising petrol, diesel and LPG prices are beginning to leave their mark on household budgets, even as India's headline inflation remains below the RBI's 4% target. SBI Research has warned that surging imported inflation and external risks could keep price pressures elevated in the coming months.
